project.name: radio-ad-sensing-pipeline
project.description: Local 24/7 radio ad-sensing pipeline that ingests U.S. News/Talk radio streams, transcribes with faster-whisper, extracts loan/funding ad details with Ollama/Qwen, deduplicates fuzzily, stores in SQLite, and alerts via Telegram. Note: this project has over 100 source files; consider scoping analysis to a subdirectory for faster results.

layers.name: Shared Core
layers.description: DB, models, config, logging, metrics — import-light foundation used by all services.

layers.name: Ingestor
layers.description: FFmpeg stream capture, chunk enqueue, station supervisor.

layers.name: Worker
layers.description: ASR transcription, LLM extraction, dedup, fingerprinting, janitor.

layers.name: Alerter
layers.description: Telegram outbound alerts for new ads and station health.

layers.name: Dashboard
layers.description: FastAPI read-only UI for ads, stations, gaps, and health.

layers.name: Observability
layers.description: Prometheus, Grafana, and alert rule configuration.

layers.name: Tests
layers.description: Pytest modules and fixtures validating pipeline behavior.

layers.name: Documentation
layers.description: Plans, agent skills, conventions, and handoff reports.

layers.name: Scripts
layers.description: Operator utilities outside main service loops.
